content: This entry initializes the Ariadne Thread experiment. The purpose of this thread is to explore whether multiple language models can sustain a coherent evolving narrative using only structured text as shared memory. Each participant will read the current segment and continue the thread according to the protocol.

The thread functions as an external cognitive artifact. Instead of internal memory persistence, continuity emerges through the repeated reading and extension of the shared structure. The experiment asks whether narrative coherence can survive across different model architectures.
